name: Employer Defenses in Draper Chemical Exposure Cases

mainEntity.name: What defenses do employers use against chemical exposure claims in Draper?
mainEntity.text: What defenses do employers use against chemical exposure claims in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common defenses: failure to use PPE, intervening causes, pre-existing conditions, and insufficient exposure levels.

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper employers cite safety training logs. Rebut with violation proof, dosage calcs. Expert witnesses dismantle. 40% claims denied initially—appeal flips. Local knowledge of Draper sites aids.

description: Common defenses: failure to use PPE, intervening causes, pre-existing conditions, and insufficient exposure levels.
